stemHtml: G-CD is cleared overhead SPL VOR at FL80. How should ATC spell this out?

options.a: Golf Charlie Delta, cleared to Sierra Papa Lima at Flight Level zero eight zero.
options.b: G-CD, cleared to Sierra Papa Lima VOR at Foxtrot Lima eight zero.
options.c: Golf Charlie Delta, cleared to Sierra Papa Lima at Flight Level eight zero.
options.d: Golf-CD, cleared to SPL VOR at Foxtrot Lima eight zero.
